name: overleaf-mcp
description: Full-CRUD MCP server for Overleaf LaTeX projects over Git: read/edit/create/delete files, parse LaTeX sections, view diffs and history.

config_file.title: Config file (overleaf_config.json)
config_file.description: Path to a JSON file listing multiple Overleaf projects. Leave blank to use single-project mode via the fields below.

cache_dir.title: Local cache directory
cache_dir.description: Directory where project clones are stored. Must be writable.

default_project_id.title: Default project ID (single-project mode)
default_project_id.description: If you're only using one Overleaf project, paste its ID here. Find it in the project URL: https://www.overleaf.com/project/<PROJECT_ID>

default_git_token.title: Default Git token (single-project mode)
default_git_token.description: Overleaf Git integration token (Menu → Git → Generate token). Stored securely in your OS keychain.

pull_ttl.title: Pull cache TTL (seconds)
pull_ttl.description: How long to reuse a cached pull before hitting the network again. Default 30s. Set to 0 to disable (pull every call).

git_timeout.title: Git operation timeout (seconds)
git_timeout.description: Hard ceiling on any blocking Git operation. Default 60s.
